name: Circleboom
description:
What Circleboom Does

Circleboom is a Pinterest scheduler that allows you to create images and gifs in its library and schedule them to be published at a later date. With Circleboom, you can upload thousands of pins and schedule their posting at the time you choose.

Source: Circleboom

Key Features

  • Bulk pins can be uploaded to their library
  • Multiple users can access the pin schedule without overwriting your work
  • Can track the progress of your pin
  • Can auto-post pin schedule to other social media 

Benefits of CircleBoom

Below are some benefits you can enjoy by partnering with Circleboom:

Bulk Upload and Schedule Pin

With Circleboom, you can upload thousands of images and schedule different posting times and dates for all. Instead of posting pins individually, you can create as many pins as possible and plan to publish them anytime you wish. 

Monitor Posts Progress

Circleboom can monitor the status of scheduled pins and pins that have already been published. This will keep you informed about each pin post's performance. 

Simple User Interface 

The platform designed for scheduling posts consists of basic steps that are simple to understand. Everything you need—from all uploads to the calendar and places to share—is clearly slated out. This means you do not need to waste time learning how to operate their website, as the process is intuitive. 

Can Auto-Post to Other Channels

Besides uploading pins on Pinterest, Circleboom can automatically post on other social media channels that you use. 

Circleboom is a Pinterest scheduler that can help you schedule and upload bulk pins through an easy-to-use interface. 

Pricing

  • Circleboom offers a free trial for users with three account
  • About $8 per month for users with up to 10 accounts 
  • And $15 per month for users with unlimited accounts 

Pros 

  • Offers affordable prices 
  • Bulk pin scheduling 
  • Offers real-time monitoring and updates 

Cons

  • Limited offers in free account
